An Education For A Lifetime

Welcome to PS 290, Manhattan New School (MNS)!

Donate Now Staff Directory Enrollment DOE Parent Portal

Our Mission

PS 290, Manhattan New School (MNS) is committed to promoting a diverse, equitable and inclusive culture where all students develop their own identities and embrace the identities of others.

Welcome to Our New Website!

We hope that you will find helpful information and resources.
